name: coder-logger
description: light-weight and easy to use extension for instant console log

coderLogger.logPrefix.markdownDescription: Optional prefix added inside the console.log label. E.g. setting `[DEBUG]` produces `console.log('[DEBUG] myVar', myVar)`.

coderLogger.quoteStyle.description: Quote character used for the console.log label string.

coderLogger.includeLineNumber.description: When enabled, the line number where the log is inserted is appended to the label.

coderLogger.quickConsoleKeybinding.markdownDescription: Default keybinding for the **Quick Console** command (`quick-console.printConsole`). Changing this value alone won't update the actual shortcut — click the button below (or run **Coder Logger: Change Quick Console Keybinding**) to open the Keyboard Shortcuts editor and set your preferred key.
